About_&_Key_Points:
About
Incorporated in 1996, Malu Paper Mills Ltd is engaged in manufacturing of Pulp & Paper.
[1]
Key Points
Business Overview:
[1]
MPML is engaged in manufacturing and sale
of Kraft Papers, Writing & Printing and News
print papers. It is the largest Newsprint and Writing and Printing manufacturer in Central
India. It produces quality Newsprint & Writing
and Printing Paper through a recycle process
and maintain a swing facility that allows it to switch between Newsprint and Writing paper production at short notice. Additionally, the company is also involved in the manufacture
of packaging paper from recycle grade.
